form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr3) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 10th-20.1 beaten 17 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $19. At the run before 6th (Fr1) over 1710m at Goulburn beaten 25 m by Rudimentary (2:04.00) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $151. Expecting a return to form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr3) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 10th-20.1 beaten 17 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $19. At the run before 6th (Fr1) over 1710m at Goulburn beaten 25 m by Rudimentary (2:04.00) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $151. Expecting a return to form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Restrained at the start to a rearward trailing position.
Checked and broke on the final corner.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr5) over 1770m at this track was 10th-18.9 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Mittys Three Aces (2:09.90) in NR up to 40 on March 15 at $26. At his previous start 8th (Fr6) over 1770m at this track, beaten 14 m by I Lika Style (2:15.80) in NR up to 40 on March 9 at $51. Better than last start and can improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr5) over 1770m at this track was 10th-18.9 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Mittys Three Aces (2:09.90) in NR up to 40 on March 15 at $26. At his previous start 8th (Fr6) over 1770m at this track, beaten 14 m by I Lika Style (2:15.80) in NR up to 40 on March 9 at $51. Better than last start and can improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced leaving the 1200m when the pace eased.
Inconvenienced approaching the 1100m when Syenite shifted in.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into eighth behind Letsgo Matilda at Junee over 1760m in a NR 39 to 40 on March 31 at $10. Performed better the start before with a game effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1760m after being wide early at Junee beaten 10 m by All So Sassy (2:12.50) in NR 36 to 39 on March 17 at $2.60. Can relish the much better draw.

formComments.title: TAB

Can relish the much better draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait in the score up and was out of position as the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr1) over 1635m at Temora was 5th-7.6 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $8.50. At his previous start 4th (Fr2) over 1760m after showing early speed at Junee, at the bell was 2nd-2 beaten 11 m by Letsgo Matilda (2:11.50) in NR 39 to 40 on March 31 at $5. Can be competitive on his best form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 3rd-4 beaten 6 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $6. Can play a role in the finish again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 3rd-4 beaten 6 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $6. Can play a role in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start and caused a false start.
Upon entering the home straight jostled with Rocket Me.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was well back in the run when 8th (Fr7) over 1710m at Goulburn was 8th-13.2 at the bell, beaten 18 m by Always Be Brendan (2:02.90) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $126. Before that 8th (Sr2) over 1740m at Bankstown, beaten 30 m by Ima Shinkansen (2:11.30) in NR up to 40 on March 16 at $34. Cannot enthuse on what we have seen of late.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in under pressure over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr3) over 1720m at Young, at the bell was 5th-7 beaten 14 m by Peaksart (2:09.20) in NR 38 to 39 on March 24 at $10. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 1770m at this track was 4th-5.2 at the bell, beaten 1.75 m by Mittys Three Aces (2:09.90) in NR up to 40 on March 15 at $5. Should improve sharply.

form.formComment: Gave plenty of ground last start when well beaten into tenth after showing early speed, behind Mittys Three Aces at this track over 1770m in a NR up to 40 on March 15 at $2. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr2) over 1770m at this track beaten 2.5 m by I Lika Style (2:15.80) in NR up to 40 on March 9 at $11. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 7th (Sr1) over 1770m at Albury beaten 10 m by Cracker Miss (2:16.10) in NR 34 to 38 on July 29 at $16. Will be better for this run and happy to watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 7th (Sr1) over 1770m at Albury beaten 10 m by Cracker Miss (2:16.10) in NR 34 to 38 on July 29 at $16. Will be better for this run and happy to watch this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1600m shifted in when not sufficiently clear of Tapanga Miss.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr7) over 1710m at Goulburn, beaten 24 m by Rudimentary (2:04.00) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $51. At the start before broke in score up and was out of position at the start 5th (Sr4) over 1770m at this track was 8th-14.4 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Mittys Three Aces (2:09.90) in NR up to 40 on March 15 at $51. Place best.
